label: Analyst Firm
definition: Market research and analyst organization publishing industry reports

label: Hardware Vendor
definition: Company producing computer hardware (servers; processors; storage)

label: Software Vendor
definition: Company producing software products (databases; operating systems; middleware)

label: Financial Services
definition: Bank; brokerage; or financial institution

label: Active
definition: Entity continues to operate under its original name

label: Acquired
definition: Entity was acquired and absorbed or rebranded by acquirer

label: Defunct
definition: Entity no longer exists in any form

label: Rebranded
definition: Entity continues to operate under a different name

label: Ubiquitous
definition: Technology has become universal/standard

label: Obsolete
definition: Technology no longer in use

label: Evolved
definition: Technology has transformed into or been succeeded by modern equivalent

label: Database Architecture
definition: Design patterns and structures for database storage and access

label: Hardware Architecture
definition: Physical computing system design and organization

label: Processor
definition: Central processing unit designs and chipsets

label: Database Software
definition: Relational and other database management system software products

label: Hardware Interconnect
definition: Bus or network technology connecting hardware components

label: Networking
definition: Network protocols and transmission technologies

label: Benchmark
definition: Standardized performance measurement tests

label: Market Trend
definition: Directional movement observed in the market

label: Market Statistic
definition: Quantified market data point

label: Performance Claim
definition: Assertion about technology performance improvement

label: Benchmark Result
definition: Result from a formal standardized benchmark test

label: Technology Definition
definition: Formal or working definition of a technology concept

label: Technology Context
definition: Background or contextual information about a technology

label: Hardware Specification
definition: Specific technical parameter of a hardware system

label: Market Assessment
definition: Analyst evaluation of competitive or market position

label: Use Case
definition: Description of a real or hypothetical application scenario

label: Forecast
definition: Forward-looking prediction about technology or market

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Broad assessment of industry structure and competitive dynamics

label: Benchmarking
definition: Systematic comparison against performance standards

label: Field Research
definition: Primary data collection from end users and practitioners

label: Database Performance Technology
definition: Domain covering database engines; hardware optimization; and performance measurement

label: Market Study
definition: Research study analyzing market conditions; competitors; and technology trends

label: High Confidence
definition: Directly stated in source text with specific figures

label: Medium Confidence
definition: Inferred or paraphrased from source text

label: Low Confidence
definition: Estimated or extrapolated from limited information

label: Author
definition: Organization that wrote and published the study

label: Subject Leader
definition: Entity identified as a market leader in the study

label: Subject
definition: Entity discussed in the study without specific leadership designation

label: Case Study User
definition: End-user organization cited as a real-world implementation example

label: Publisher
definition: Organization responsible for distribution of the study

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of an entity's business strategy or competitive positioning

label: Viability Prediction
definition: Expert prediction of entity's long-term survival or market trajectory

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Verified historical outcome for an entity or prediction

label: Technology Assessment
definition: Evaluation of a technology's maturity, fitness, or competitive positioning

label: Framework Factor
definition: One component of a multi-factor analytical framework

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative market statistic such as revenue, share, or growth rate

label: Expert Opinion
definition: Qualitative professional judgment or analytical finding

label: Document Review
definition: Analysis of existing documents, reports, and published records

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Detailed comparison of competing entities' strategies, products, and positions

label: Revenue Benchmarking
definition: Measurement and comparison of entity revenues against market total

label: Verified
definition: Confirmed by subsequent events, independent sources, or official records
